achievements.description: Collect the "Black Bangle", "Red Bangle", and "Green Bangle" with one girl.
achievements.author: Skiichi

achievements.title: Nearly Friendly
achievements.description: Collect the "Plain Bracelet", "Tropical Bracelet", "Metallic Bracelet", and "Leather Bracelet" with one girl.
achievements.author: Skiichi

achievements.title: Perfect for Exercising
achievements.description: Collect the "White Wristband", "Navy Blue Wristband", "Pink Wristband", "Leopard Wristband", "Black Leopard Wristband", and "Plain Wristband" with one girl.
achievements.author: Skiichi

achievements.title: It's Designer!
achievements.description: Collect the "Leather Bag", "Cloth Bag", "Hand Basket", "Fashionable Basket" and "Blue Wind-Chime" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: In the Breeze
achievements.description: Collect the "Red Wind-Chime", "Yellow Wind-Chime", "Cabbage", "Fried Chicken" and "Chocolate" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Lucky Charm
achievements.description: Collect the "Four-Leaf Clover", "Kasumi Coin", "Crab", "Crystal Ornament" and "Chinese Tea Set" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Frequently at Bars
achievements.description: Collect the "Darts", "Iced Cafe Au Lait", "Coconut Milk", "Iced Coffee" and "Lemonade" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Thirsty
achievements.description: Collect the "Orange Juice", "Cream Soda", "Iced Tea", "Tomato Juice" and "Tropical Fruit Punch" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Get Your Tan On
achievements.description: Collect the "Encyclopedia", "Peacock Fan", "Blue Flying Disc", "Rainbow Flying Disc" and "Sunset Flying Disc" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Fruit Enjoyer
achievements.description: Collect the "Apple", "Bananas", "Grapes", "Melon" and "Tangerines" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Fruit Makes You Strong!
achievements.description: Collect the "Peaches", "Pineapple", "Strawberries", "Watermelon" and "Dumbbell" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Starting My Own Band
achievements.description: Collect the "Lantern", "Electric Guitar", "Harmonica", "Harp" and "Microphone" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Of Time
achievements.description: Collect the "Ocarina", "Recorder", "Gold Trumpet", "Silver Trumpet" and "Japanese Drum" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Read All About It!
achievements.description: Collect the "Violin", "Sheet Music", "Romance Novel", "Notebook Computer" and "Newspaper" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Antique Collector
achievements.description: Collect the "Opera Glasses", "Toaster Oven", "Lace Parasol", "Japanese Parasol" and "Red Pinwheel" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Extra Pineapple
achievements.description: Collect the "Pink Pinwheel", "Purple Pinwheel", "Pizza", "Potted Plant" and "Lyrical Poetry Anthology" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Rev Up Those Fryers
achievements.description: Collect the "French Fries", "Black RC Car", "Sky Blue RC Car", "Blue RC Airplane" and "Yellow RC Airplane" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Ice Cream Machine Broke
achievements.description: Collect the "Tea Ceremony Set", "Legendary Scarab", "Sketch Drawing Set", "Soft-Serve Ice Cream" and "Red Watering Can" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: True Authenticity
achievements.description: Collect the "Orange Watering Can", "White Watering Can", "Sushi", "Japanese Dessert" and "Blanc Manger" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Sweets Lover
achievements.description: Collect the "Cheesecake", "Donuts", "Marrons Glaces", "Strawberry Mille-feuille" and "Cherry Pie" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Bookworm
achievements.description: Collect the "Almond Tofu", "Sachertorte", "Novel: Sea of Light", "Novel: Infinite Space" and "Novel: Bridge to the Stars" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Worth a Fortune
achievements.description: Collect the "Novel: The Little Blue Bird", "Tea Set", "Telescope", "Tomatoes" and "Old Watch" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Frequently Sick
achievements.description: Collect the "Gingerbread Cookies", "Ginger Ale", "Cherries", "Blue Ball" and "Union Jack Ball" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: One True Passion
achievements.description: Collect the "Ocean Ball", "Forest Ball", "Snow Ball", "Polka Dot Ball" and "Fluorescent Ball" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: All That Glitters
achievements.description: Collect the "Gold Ball", "Green Ball", "Lime Ball", "Leopard Ball" and "Orange Ball" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Volleyball Connoisseur
achievements.description: Collect the "Purple Ball", "Red Ball", "Rainbow Ball", "Silver Ball" and "Stars and Stripes Ball" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi

achievements.title: Win, Win, Win Again!
achievements.description: Collect the "White Ball", "Yellow Ball", "Zebra Ball" and "Strange Ball" with one girl.
achievements.author: Raichi
